market_structure.notes: Price fell 50 points directly onto the Blue 200 EMA with heavy red money flow indicating a high-probability bounce zone (Mean Reversion).

reasons: Confluence of moving average support (EMA) after extreme short-term plunge.
Statistical 'elastic effect' predicting return to the rapid Red MA.
Macro sector strength keeping deep dips viable for longs.
trades.raw_context_excerpt: Tu es dans la 'Golden Zone' pour un achat... Le prix s'écrase pile sur la Moyenne Mobile Bleue (4841)... Target: 4860.
trades.notes: Verified against CSV. Entry matched the 4840-4842 call box beautifully, netting a rapid ~23 points.

market_structure.notes: Shooting star rejection on H1 timeline and capital outflow confirmed by Risk-On equity surges (MNQ).

reasons: Fundamentally driven 'De-escalation' in Greenland crisis draining safe-haven premiums.
Direct sector liquidation logic supported by steep drop in Silver.
Huge liquidity void below waiting to be filled ('Gap Fill').
trades.raw_context_excerpt: Tu paries sur l'effacement de la 'Prime de Peur'... Les investisseurs vendent l'Or pour acheter des Actions. C'est le flux financier classique.
trades.notes: The trader shifted from pure TA scalper to Macro Swing trader effectively calling the geopolitical peak.

market_structure.notes: Compression squeezing up against the moving averages inside the prior evening's high tight flag structure.

reasons: Anticipating London volume resolving the pre-market pennant upward.
Price grinding higher securely supported by dynamic red MA level.
trades.raw_context_excerpt: On est donc coincé dans un Triangle Ascendant. C'est une figure de continuation haussière classique. Target: 4700.
trades.notes: Early sign of directional buildup capitalizing on European volume injections.

market_structure.notes: Gold maintained floor logic across several sessions, avoiding a bearish gap fill that many anticipated.

reasons: Tested a strict horizontal range support parameter for the third time avoiding breakdowns.
Reclaim of internal short term EMA and oscillators bouncing back rapidly post selloff.
trades.raw_context_excerpt: Le scénario du 'Triple Bottom' sur 4664 s'est réalisé à la perfection. Le marché REFUSE de corriger le Gap.
trades.notes: Verified per CSV logs. Purchased 4665.6 with textbook support validation strategy ending in excellent R:R setup closing at 4692.3.

market_structure.notes: Brutal sell-off causing User to question why algorithm support limits ('bleu support') are targeted for extreme testing.

reasons: Avoid trying to stop runaway price cascades with manual limit orders (buying walls).
A macro MA functions as an institutional filter but isn't infallible during abnormal downward thrust volume.
Price action validation is paramount, closing levels confirm breakdowns not single wicks.
trades.raw_context_excerpt: C'est une prophétie auto-réalisatrice. Quand un train arrive à pleine vitesse sur un mur, il y a de fortes chances qu'il le fissure. CE N'EST PAS UN MUR EN BÉTON, C'EST UN FILET.
trades.notes: Not executed trade but immense mentoring value explaining mechanics behind liquidity hunting logic.

market_structure.notes: Price compression 5 mins prior to economic event logic, awaiting macro trigger rather than jumping early.

reasons: Impending high volatility 08:30 economic reporting window inherently creates 'randomized' violent candle wicks.
Advised watching closing candle trajectory instead to verify safe continuation toward ~4945.
Sidestepping pure statistical guesswork associated with immediate news reaction releases.
trades.raw_context_excerpt: RÈGLE : NE CLIQUE PAS AVANT 08H31. Laisse l'algo de news passer... Si ça casse 4938 on achète sur repli.
trades.notes: Displays structural discipline required before major events avoiding pure volatility wipes.
